dialogos.texto_en: This is Ocean Expo Park, huh?\nIt's totally different\nfrom what I imagined a park to be like.
There seem to be various facilities here.\nAn aquarium, a tropical botanical garden,\nan oceanic culture museum... There's a beach too.
However, it took us more time to get here\nthan I thought.
Y-yeah.
You're not tired, Yotsuba?
I have confidence in my endurance.
Well, I guess that's true.\nYou have much more endurance than me, after all.
Ahaha...
(...Yet, I feel mentally exhausted,\n more than physically.)
(Even though I linked arms with Yotsuba,\n I couldn't think of anything to say that\n would sound like a conversation between lovers.)
*sigh*
Umm, Uesugi-san?\nAre you alright?
Ah, sorry!\nThat just now...
Sighs on dates is a no-go, Fu-kun.
A d-date?!\nTh-th-th-that's not what this is?!\nEveryone is here!
A-alright, now, umm...
Everyone said they want to go to Churaumi Aquarium,\nso I think we should go there last.
Before that, let's explore the park!
Where should we go?
With it being this big I'm bound to get lost.
How about we split up and go wherever we want?
Afterward, we can meet up here later\nto go to the aquarium together?
Then, let's decide on when to meet up.
(Free time, huh.\n In that case...)
Yotsuba, do you want to go around with Futaro?
Huh?!\nI-I wonder if that's a good idea?
Then, can I invite him?
U-umm...
Hey, Fu-kun, where are you planning to go?\nLet's go around together.
N-Nino?!
Nino, don't leave me behind.
Huh? Isn't this supposed to be free time?
Hey, do I not have any freedom?
Hm...
Do your best, Yotsuba!
